Off Calendar May-27-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Bridges for the Petitioner.

Mr. Bridges requested dropping the matter to allow the filing of alternate pleadings. The Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Giselle Casey CSR#8098. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Neu.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Mark Bridges appearing for and with petitioner. Court questions the notice to Ciara. Notice was sent to the grandmother when Ciara was staying with her. Further notice to Ciara is dispensed with. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
